overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character moves from a narrow covered corridor through an indoor plaza with NPCs, up a large staircase, and emerges into a sprawling urban downtown filled with towering holographic advertisements and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk service corridor with industrial piping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor with blue industrial walls and overhead pipes

entered.detail: tall blue metal wall with graffiti reading 'I Kill Claws'
large industrial ventilation pipes running along the ceiling
glowing purple-lit vending machines with digital displays
concrete walls covered in colorful cyberpunk graffiti tags
large overhead screen displaying food advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed corridor with blue industrial walls and overhead metal piping. Neon-lit vending machines glow on the right while graffiti covers the concrete walls. The environment is artificially lit with a cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor plaza with stairs and vending machines

events.description: exits narrow corridor into larger indoor plaza area with multiple NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor plaza, navigating around NPCs and trash debris

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing near the stairs, one wearing a reflective jacket
NPC sitting on the ground next to a discarded mattress

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to the next level
brightly lit arcade cabinets with digital displays
scattered debris and garbage bags on the concrete floor
old mattress lying on the ground near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a larger indoor plaza filled with NPCs standing around and trash scattered on the ground. Arcade machines glow on the left while a wide concrete staircase leads upward. The atmosphere is gritty with a mix of artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: large concrete stairwell with wall murals

events.description: reaches top of stairs and exits into open neon-lit city street

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase toward the city above

entered.detail: broad concrete staircase ascending between walls
large green circular industrial murals painted on the right wall
illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the stairwell walls
concrete archway at the top of the stairs leading outside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete stairwell with green circular murals on the walls and digital advertisements. The enclosed space transitions from the indoor plaza upward toward the open city above.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk downtown with towering holographic advertisements

events.description: camera pans upward to look at towering buildings and holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the open city street, looking around at the towering neon buildings and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: person sitting on steps near the street edge
futuristic car driving down the neon-lit street

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades covered in neon lighting
giant floating digital advertisements including a prominent pink 'Wide Open' billboard
wet asphalt street reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
futuristic cars driving along the multi-lane street
brightly lit commercial storefronts with cyan and pink neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs into a vast open cyberpunk cityscape at night. Towering glass buildings covered in holographic billboards and neon signs surround the wet reflective streets. The camera pans to take in the massive scale of the urban environment as futuristic vehicles drive by and pedestrians move through the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban metropolis. It begins by following the character through a narrow enclosed passage of blue industrial walls and glowing vending machines, moving forward until the space opens into a gritty indoor plaza filled with NPCs and arcade machines. As the character continues forward, the scene shifts upward along a wide concrete stairwell adorned with green circular murals and digital advertisements, bridging the gap between the interior and the city above. The camera finally emerges from the stairs into a vast open cityscape at night, where the view expands to reveal towering glass buildings, holographic billboards, and wet reflective streets teeming with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians.
